  Create a plist date value from an RFC 3339 timestamp

# function: plistdate

Returns a tagged object representing an NSDate plist value. When passed to plistencode, this produces a <date> element. The same tagged object format is returned by plistdecode for <date> elements, enabling seamless round-trips.

## Example Usage

```terraform
// Tagged-object representation of an Apple plist <date> element.
output "expires" {
  value = provider::burnham::plistdate("2026-06-01T00:00:00Z")
  // → { __plist_type = "date", value = "2026-06-01T00:00:00Z" }
}
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
plistdate(rfc3339 string) dynamic
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `rfc3339` (String) An RFC 3339 timestamp string, e.g. "2025-06-01T00:00:00Z".
